description_for_human: Crypto treasury runway modeling for Web3 orgs. Know how long your money lasts.
description_for_model: RoughRunway models how long a crypto protocol's treasury will last given burn rates and volatile asset prices. Use the /api/agent/build endpoint to create a runway model from a plain-English description of the org's treasury, team size, and burn rate. Returns a shareUrl the user can open to view their interactive model.
